content_preview: Abstract

IMPORTANCE The Sepsis Prediction Model (SPM) is a proprietary decision support tool created by Epic Systems; it generates a predicting sepsis score (PSS). The model has not undergone validation agains
OBJECTIVE To assess the validity and timeliness of the SPM compared with SIRS, qSOFA, and SOFA.

content_preview: Meaning While the balanced accuracy of the SPM was better than qSOFA, SOFA, and SIRS at higher-threshold PSS, it had poor timeliness for sepsis prediction.

The Third International Task Force on Sepsis and Septic Shock (Sepsis-3) established a consensus definition of sepsis as "life-threatening organ dysfunction caused by a dysregulated host response to i
